_comment: SHA-256 known-good hashes for files we care about. Used by M4.2 to detect tampering, partial downloads, or AV-quarantined corruption. Empty by default — populate when ready by running tools/update_integrity_manifest.ps1 against a clean reference install. Match by relative path under <module_root>.

_format.version: Optional — only check this entry when SubModule.xml Version matches.
_format.files: Map of relative-path-from-module-root → expected SHA-256 hex (lowercase).
